devs.description: A list of developers working on this bot. Enables some developer commands and states.

hq_server_invite.description: The invite link for the headquarter or support community.

hq_server_id.description: The ID of the headquarter or support community.

bot_invite_link.description: The invite link to invite the bot.

items.description: A command prefix to respond to.

prefixes.description: A list of command prefixes to respond to.

database.description: The path (absolute preferred) to the database file.

api.description: The path to the Fluxer API endpoint.

data.description: The path (absolute preferred) to the data directory.

use_extras.description: Enable if you want the bot to use extra plugin features.

user_token.description: The token of the user who owns the bot in the Applications page. Used for setting bot bio.

bio.description: A mapping of the bot's bio states.

additionalProperties.description: A Template to set for the bot's bio.
